"'''Hive of the Infidel'''" is a [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] adventure published in [[Star Wars Gamer 8|''Star Wars Gamer'' 8]]. It was written by [[David Noonan]] and [[Peter M. Schweighofer]], and was illustrated by [[Derek Thompson]].

==Plot summary==
The players take on the role of [[Yuuzhan Vong]] infiltrators. They are hunting a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] aboard the ''[[Chilastra]]''.

Once aboard, they must search for the [[Force Adept]] [[Ka-Tu-Un]].
